journeys.title: Anonymous visitor browses public content, hits auth guards, and inspects public APIs

steps.label: Open the home page
steps.expected_result: The home page should resolve the mz host to Mozambique and show featured content.
assertions: Featured jobs strip or featured cards render
Market label resolves to Employed MZ or Mozambique copy

screenshot.label: visitor-home
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Hero headline is visible above the fold
Featured jobs cards are present or empty state is visually intentional
Header remains legible with market and locale selectors

steps.label: Open the public jobs index
steps.expected_result: The visitor lands on the browse page with filters and a public results grid.
assertions: Job results summary shows total jobs found

screenshot.label: visitor-browse-jobs
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Featured strip is separated from results grid

steps.label: Inspect featured jobs API directly
steps.expected_result: Featured jobs API returns an array of featured active listings scoped to the current market.
assertions: Response body is a JSON array
Each item has id, title, and featured window metadata when present

steps.label: Filter by category/job type
steps.expected_result: The jobs list narrows to the selected employment type.

screenshot.label: visitor-jobtype-filter
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Selected filter chip or select state is visible
No overflow or broken layout in filter bar

steps.label: Filter by location using the shared search box
steps.expected_result: Search should match location text and return relevant Mozambique jobs.
assertions: Rendered cards contain Maputo or show a meaningful empty state

steps.label: Request filtered count
steps.expected_result: Count endpoint returns the same filtered total the UI summary is based on.
assertions: Total is consistent with visible result count or pagination summary

steps.label: Search by keyword
steps.expected_result: The page refreshes with the current keyword and filter state applied.
assertions: Keyword search results are shown or a no-results state explains the filter outcome

screenshot.label: visitor-keyword-search
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Applied filters are clear to the user
Search and reset buttons remain accessible

steps.label: Open a job detail page
steps.expected_result: The visitor can review the job detail page without authentication.

screenshot.label: visitor-job-detail
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Job title and company are readable
Apply card is visible in sidebar or stacked layout
Description content is readable and not clipped
Badges such as Remote or Featured are visually consistent

steps.label: Attempt a gated apply flow
steps.expected_result: If the product gates applying, the user is redirected to sign-in while preserving the return URL.
assertions: Either a redirect to /sign-in occurs or an auth-required modal appears
Redirect query preserves the originating job URL or apply anchor
No authenticated-only action is performed without a session

screenshot.label: visitor-apply-guard
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: No broken overlay or clipped modal is present

steps.label: Inspect OAuth entry from the sign-in screen
steps.expected_result: Clicking an OAuth button should initiate a provider redirect request.
assertions: The Google OAuth button is visible
Backend responds with a redirect or a configuration error that is understandable in test environments

screenshot.label: visitor-oauth-entry
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: OAuth buttons are visible and clearly labeled
The sign-in surface remains readable on desktop
Third-party auth options are visually distinct

steps.label: Exercise the OAuth callback route with a mocked provider response
steps.expected_result: The callback route should be reachable by automation with a mocked code/state pair or fail with a deterministic validation error.
assertions: Error handling is deterministic when state or provider config is invalid
Successful mocked callbacks produce a token payload when stubs are enabled

steps.label: Return to jobs list
steps.expected_result: The visitor can continue browsing after auth exploration.
assertions: Public browsing does not require a session

steps.label: Review the terms page
steps.expected_result: Legal terms content is accessible without authentication.
assertions: Page contains Terms heading or legal copy

screenshot.label: visitor-terms
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Page spacing remains comfortable for long-form content

steps.label: Review the privacy page
steps.expected_result: Privacy information is accessible without authentication.
assertions: Privacy heading or data handling copy is present

screenshot.label: visitor-privacy
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Content is readable without overlapping sections

steps.label: Try the protected my jobs route
steps.expected_result: Anonymous access should redirect to sign-in with a redirect parameter.

screenshot.label: visitor-myjobs-redirect
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Context-preserving redirect parameter is present or surfaced
No blank screen or flash of protected content occurs

steps.label: Try the protected admin route
steps.expected_result: Anonymous access should redirect away from admin moderation.
assertions: No admin job table renders for anonymous traffic
Protected route does not leak moderation data

screenshot.label: visitor-admin-redirect
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Protected route does not expose admin content

steps.label: Call the public jobs API
steps.expected_result: Public API returns market-scoped paginated jobs without contact details.
assertions: Response contains items, total, page, and page_size
Contact fields are omitted or null in public API responses

steps.label: Call the public featured jobs API
steps.expected_result: Public featured endpoint returns a lightweight array for unauthenticated consumers.
assertions: Returned items represent active featured jobs only

steps.label: Open a nonexistent job URL
steps.expected_result: The application should show a 404 experience instead of an unhandled error.
assertions: 404 page title or 'We couldn’t find that page.' message is visible
Recovery actions back home and browse jobs are present
The page uses the market-specific shell

screenshot.label: visitor-404
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: The error page looks intentional rather than broken

journeys.title: Ana registers, verifies her email, creates a profile, and browses jobs

steps.label: Open sign-up page
steps.expected_result: Registration form loads with local and OAuth options.

screenshot.label: seeker-signup-start
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Registration form is centered and readable
OAuth alternatives are visible beneath the form

steps.label: Enter an invalid email first
steps.expected_result: Browser or client validation prevents submission until the email is corrected.
assertions: Email input contains invalid value before correction
Submit remains blocked or email field shows validation message

mistake_then_correct.expected_error: Email format is invalid or form cannot submit
mistake_then_correct.expected_after_correction: Valid email is accepted and the form becomes submittable

steps.label: Enter a too-short password first
steps.expected_result: Password strength stays weak and submit remains unavailable.
assertions: Password strength indicator shows weak or disabled submit state
Create account button remains disabled until requirements are met

mistake_then_correct.expected_error: Password is too short or submit remains disabled
mistake_then_correct.expected_after_correction: Password strength improves and submit becomes available

steps.label: Complete the registration form with valid values
steps.expected_result: The form is ready for submission.
assertions: All required fields contain valid values

steps.label: Submit registration
steps.expected_result: The backend creates the account and the UI instructs Ana to verify her email.
assertions: No access token is assumed yet
New user is unverified until token confirmation

screenshot.label: seeker-signup-submitted
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: User understands email verification is required

steps.label: Check MailHog for the verification email
steps.expected_result: MailHog returns the verification email sent by the register endpoint.
assertions: HTTP status is 200 in the test environment
At least one message to Ana's email is returned

steps.label: Extract the verification token and visit the verification route
steps.expected_result: Frontend verify page posts the token to the backend and confirms success.
assertions: Success message confirms the email is verified
CTA to sign in becomes available

screenshot.label: seeker-verify-email
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: The screen does not expose raw token data

steps.label: Continue to sign in
steps.expected_result: Ana is routed to the sign-in page after verification.
assertions: Email and password inputs are visible

steps.label: Sign in with the verified account
steps.expected_result: Ana receives a token pair and becomes authenticated in the browser.
assertions: Sign out button or authenticated header state appears

screenshot.label: seeker-login-success
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: User is not left on an error state
Page shell remains stable after login

steps.label: Refresh the session token
steps.expected_result: Backend exchanges the refresh token for a fresh bearer token pair.
assertions: Returned user payload matches Ana's account

steps.label: Fetch the authenticated user snapshot
steps.expected_result: The API returns Ana's identity and verification state.
assertions: roles is an array and email_verified is true

steps.label: Open account settings
steps.expected_result: Protected account route loads for the authenticated seeker.
assertions: Export and deletion actions are visible

screenshot.label: seeker-account
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Primary account actions are above the fold

steps.label: Create the individual profile

input_value.name: Ana Mondlane
input_value.title: Business Administration Graduate
input_value.description: Recent graduate seeking entry-level administration and operations roles.

steps.expected_result: Ana's seeker profile is created or upserted successfully.

screenshot.label: seeker-profile-created
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Profile type and role summary are readable
No duplicate form or error overlay is visible

steps.label: Fetch the public profile by user id
steps.expected_result: Once activated in fixtures, the public profile endpoint returns Ana's profile card data.
assertions: If the profile is active, returned user_id matches Ana
If not active yet, the API returns a controlled 404

steps.label: Browse and search jobs
steps.expected_result: Ana can browse jobs and use the shared search box to narrow listings.
assertions: Search roles input contains the keyword
Results list or empty-state text is visible

screenshot.label: seeker-browse-search
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Filter bar and job cards fit comfortably on desktop
Search keyword is visible in the filter input

steps.label: View a job detail page
steps.expected_result: Ana can inspect an individual job before deciding whether to apply.

steps.label: Visit my jobs and confirm the empty employer state
steps.expected_result: Because Ana is a seeker rather than an employer, the page should show no posted jobs.
assertions: Empty state says no jobs have been posted yet or equivalent

screenshot.label: seeker-myjobs-empty
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: The page does not look broken despite zero jobs

steps.label: Sign out
steps.expected_result: Authenticated state is cleared and public navigation is restored.
assertions: Sign in link becomes visible again
Protected cookies/local storage token is cleared by the test harness
Visitor can navigate as anonymous again

journeys.title: Ana recovers access through the forgot-password flow

steps.label: Open forgot-password page
steps.expected_result: Reset request form loads with a single email field.
assertions: Send reset link button is visible

steps.label: Enter Ana's email and submit
steps.expected_result: The UI shows a generic success confirmation regardless of account existence.
assertions: Confirmation text contains 'If an account exists'
No sensitive account existence leak is shown

screenshot.label: recovery-requested
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: No raw server error is visible
Email field remains available for retry

steps.label: Search MailHog for the reset email
steps.expected_result: The password reset email is discoverable in the test mailbox.
assertions: HTTP status is 200 in test environment
Email body contains a reset link

steps.label: Extract reset token
steps.expected_result: Automation extracts the opaque reset token from the email body.
assertions: Token can be substituted into the reset route
No credentials are stored in plain text artifacts

steps.label: Open reset-password route
steps.expected_result: Reset form loads for a valid token or shows a controlled invalid-link state.
assertions: Either new password form or invalid-link message is visible

steps.label: Enter mismatched passwords first
steps.expected_result: Mismatch feedback prevents submission until both values match.
assertions: Inline text 'Passwords do not match.' is visible
Submit button remains disabled or submit is blocked

mistake_then_correct.expected_after_correction: Form accepts the corrected matching passwords

steps.label: Correct the passwords
steps.expected_result: Form becomes valid and ready to submit.

steps.label: Submit the new password
steps.expected_result: Backend stores the new password and frontend routes Ana back to sign in.

screenshot.label: recovery-password-updated
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Redirect or confirmation message is visible
The user understands the reset succeeded
No raw token data is exposed

steps.label: Confirm the success hint on sign-in
steps.expected_result: The sign-in screen acknowledges that the password was changed.
assertions: Sign-in form is visible and ready for new credentials

steps.label: Sign in with the new password
steps.expected_result: Ana regains access using the updated password.
assertions: Session tokens are refreshed for the new password timestamp

steps.label: Open account to prove recovery worked
steps.expected_result: Protected routes are accessible after the reset.
assertions: Protected route no longer redirects to sign-in

screenshot.label: recovery-account-access
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: No auth guard redirect is shown

steps.label: Sign out after recovery
steps.expected_result: Ana leaves the session cleanly after confirming recovery success.
assertions: Sign in link becomes visible again

journeys.title: Ana exercises export, deletion scheduling, cancellation, resend verification, and token refresh

steps.label: Sign in as Ana
steps.expected_result: Ana enters an authenticated session for account management.
assertions: After submit, authenticated header state appears

steps.label: Fetch current user state
steps.expected_result: Current user payload includes id, roles, verification state, and deletion schedule if any.

steps.label: Open account settings
steps.expected_result: Protected account page is available.

screenshot.label: accountmgmt-account
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Export and danger-zone actions are visible

steps.label: Export personal data
steps.expected_result: Browser downloads a JSON export generated from the authenticated account snapshot.
assertions: Response payload contains generated_at and account keys

screenshot.label: accountmgmt-export
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: The page remains stable while download begins
No raw exception text is displayed

steps.label: Schedule account deletion
steps.expected_result: Deletion enters a 30-day grace period and the danger zone updates.
assertions: Cancel deletion action replaces the delete button

screenshot.label: accountmgmt-request-deletion
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Scheduled deletion date or countdown is visible

steps.label: Verify the countdown state
steps.expected_result: The page shows the pending deletion countdown without a refresh loop.
assertions: Countdown or scheduled date text is present
Cancel deletion request button is visible

steps.label: Cancel the deletion request
steps.expected_result: Scheduled deletion is cleared and the danger zone returns to its initial state.

steps.label: Resend verification email even for already-verified accounts
steps.target: button:has-text('Resend verification email') or api_request fallback
steps.expected_result: The endpoint either sends a new verification email or returns an already-verified confirmation.

steps.label: Check MailHog for the resend outcome
steps.expected_result: If a resend occurred, the latest verification email is visible in MailHog.
assertions: MailHog search completes in the test environment
Message list can be filtered by recipient
The newest message is a verification email when resend is allowed

steps.label: Refresh the session token from account state
steps.expected_result: A fresh token pair is issued without forcing a new login.
assertions: New token payload contains access_token and refresh_token

steps.label: Reload account after refresh
steps.expected_result: The refreshed session continues to authorize account access.
assertions: Account settings still render after refresh

screenshot.label: accountmgmt-post-refresh
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Account screen remains intact after refresh
No auth flicker or blank state is visible

steps.label: Sign out after account management
steps.expected_result: Ana exits the session cleanly.
assertions: Protected navigation is no longer accessible without re-authentication

journeys.title: Carlos registers, posts a job, sees moderation updates, edits it, deactivates it, and deletes it

steps.label: Open sign-up and register Carlos
steps.expected_result: Employer registration enters the verification-needed state.
assertions: Submit leads to a check-email confirmation

screenshot.label: employer-register
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Confirmation state explains the next step

steps.label: Verify Carlos via MailHog token
steps.expected_result: Verification succeeds and enables sign-in.
assertions: MailHog message contains a verification link
CTA to sign in is visible

screenshot.label: employer-verify
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: No raw error details are shown

steps.label: Sign in as Carlos
steps.expected_result: Carlos receives an authenticated employer session.
assertions: Authenticated header or sign-out button appears

steps.label: Create a company profile

input_value.name: Construções Maputo Lda
input_value.title: HR Manager
input_value.description: Mid-size construction company hiring across Mozambique.

steps.expected_result: Carlos now has a company profile associated with his account.
assertions: Returned name equals Construções Maputo Lda

screenshot.label: employer-profile-create
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Profile creation outcome is visible or logged for the user

steps.label: Update the company profile with fuller details

input_value.title: Head of Talent Acquisition
input_value.description: Hiring engineers, technicians, and project coordinators across active worksites.

steps.expected_result: Profile changes are saved without creating a duplicate record.
assertions: Updated description is sanitized and persisted

steps.label: Open the new job form
steps.expected_result: Protected job-posting form loads for the authenticated employer.
assertions: Job title, contact, and description controls are visible

steps.label: Submit with an empty title first
steps.expected_result: Validation blocks submission and surfaces the missing-title error.
assertions: Error text says a job title is required
No job is created while validation fails

screenshot.label: employer-empty-title-error
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Validation error is readable near the relevant field

mistake_then_correct.expected_after_correction: Job can be submitted once the title is provided

steps.label: Complete the full job form

input_value.title: Site Supervisor
input_value.description: Lead site coordination, track crews, and oversee project safety.

steps.expected_result: All required and optional fields are populated, including salary and contact details.
assertions: Job title input contains Site Supervisor
Rich text description contains the role summary

screenshot.label: employer-job-filled
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Optional payment-related fields are not blocking submission

steps.label: Submit the job
steps.expected_result: A pending job listing is created and Carlos is routed to the new job detail page.

screenshot.label: employer-job-submitted
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Job title is visible on the resulting page
No blank or duplicate page render occurs

steps.label: Check MailHog for the submission confirmation
steps.expected_result: A submission confirmation email exists for the employer.
assertions: Subject mentions job submission or moderation
Body includes the job title or listing link

steps.label: Open my jobs and confirm pending status
steps.expected_result: Carlos sees the newly created listing in his dashboard as pending.
assertions: My jobs page shows the new title
Feature, edit, and status actions are visible

steps.label: Wait for admin approval via API
steps.expected_result: The pending listing is visible to the admin moderation queue before approval.
assertions: Listing id/title appears in the pending queue
Status is pending before the approval event

steps.label: Refresh my jobs after admin approval
steps.expected_result: Once moderation approves the listing, Carlos sees it as active.

screenshot.label: employer-myjobs-active
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: The state change is obvious to the employer

steps.label: Open the edit route
steps.expected_result: The edit form loads prefilled with the existing listing values.
assertions: Job title and company fields are pre-populated

steps.label: Save changes to the active job
steps.expected_result: Listing updates persist and the detail page reflects the new content.
assertions: Updated title is Senior Site Supervisor

screenshot.label: employer-job-updated
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: No stale values remain on the page

steps.label: Open the updated job detail page
steps.expected_result: The detail page shows the edited values.
assertions: Listing details panel shows the revised location

screenshot.label: employer-updated-detail
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Sidebar and body copy remain aligned
No stale pending state is shown

steps.label: Deactivate the job
steps.expected_result: The active listing transitions to inactive or filled and disappears from the public feed.

steps.label: Delete the job
steps.expected_result: The listing is permanently removed from Carlos's dashboard after confirmation.
assertions: Deleted listing no longer resolves publicly

screenshot.label: employer-deleted
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Removed job no longer appears in the dashboard

journeys.title: Carlos features a job, inspects payment status, and cancels an intent

steps.label: Sign in as Carlos
steps.expected_result: Carlos has an authenticated employer session for payments.
assertions: Authenticated state is visible after submit

steps.label: Create a fresh job to feature

input_value.title: Featured Quantity Surveyor
input_value.description: Role created specifically for featured-payment UAT.

steps.expected_result: A new pending or active listing exists for payment flows.
assertions: Submission creates a new job id
Carlos can return to my jobs with the new listing visible

screenshot.label: payment-job-created
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: The created listing title is visible

steps.label: Open my jobs dashboard
steps.expected_result: The new job card is visible with a Feature action.
assertions: Feature button exists on the target job card

steps.label: Open the feature modal
steps.expected_result: Feature modal loads available providers for the mz market.
assertions: Provider choices include Stripe, M-Pesa, and e-Mola
Close and Continue buttons are visible

steps.label: Inspect provider availability
steps.expected_result: Providers API returns Stripe, M-Pesa, and e-Mola for Mozambique.
assertions: Provider list contains stripe, mpesa, and emola

steps.label: Start a Stripe intent
steps.expected_result: Selecting Stripe prepares a redirect-style featured-job payment intent.
assertions: Provider description references secure card checkout

steps.label: Continue with Stripe
steps.expected_result: A payment intent is created and either redirects or returns a pending intent id for test automation.
assertions: Kind is redirect or await depending on harness

screenshot.label: payment-stripe-initiated
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: No raw backend traceback is shown

steps.label: Check the Stripe intent status
steps.expected_result: The payment intent status can be polled while pending.
assertions: Status is pending, awaiting_user, or another controlled intermediate value

steps.label: Cancel the Stripe intent
steps.expected_result: Pending Stripe intent moves to cancelled.

screenshot.label: payment-stripe-cancelled
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Cancellation state is visually obvious or logged
The user can continue using the dashboard

steps.label: Check status again after cancellation
steps.expected_result: Polling confirms the cancelled state is stable.

steps.label: Reopen the modal and choose M-Pesa
steps.expected_result: M-Pesa-specific UI requests a Mozambican phone number.

steps.label: Try an invalid M-Pesa number first
steps.expected_result: Client validation blocks using an e-Mola-style number for M-Pesa.
assertions: Validation message says to use a number starting with 84 or 85
Continue action is blocked until correction

steps.label: Initiate a valid M-Pesa intent
steps.expected_result: Backend creates an awaiting_user simulator intent for M-Pesa.

screenshot.label: payment-mpesa-initiated
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: The provider reference or next step is visible

steps.label: Poll the M-Pesa status
steps.expected_result: The mobile-money intent exposes a pollable intermediate state.
assertions: Status API returns awaiting_user, pending, cancelled, or completed
extended_through is set when settlement completes

journeys.title: Marta moderates jobs, manages admin roles, and resolves reports

steps.label: Register Marta
steps.expected_result: Admin candidate account enters verification-needed state.

steps.label: Verify Marta
steps.expected_result: Verification succeeds and Marta can sign in.
assertions: Go to sign in CTA is visible

steps.label: Sign in as Marta
steps.expected_result: Authenticated but not yet elevated session exists.

steps.label: Grant Marta the admin role through test bootstrap
steps.expected_result: Harness or bootstrap admin grants Marta the admin role required by middleware.
assertions: Subsequent admin routes no longer redirect away

steps.label: Open admin jobs
steps.expected_result: Admin moderation dashboard loads with jobs, users, and reports panels.
assertions: Admin job moderation heading is visible
Admin users and Reports queue panels are visible

screenshot.label: admin-dashboard
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: The page looks like a cohesive admin workspace

steps.label: Filter the queue to pending
steps.expected_result: Pending moderation items are listed in the table.
assertions: Rows show pending jobs or an intentional empty state
Checkbox column is visible for bulk actions

screenshot.label: admin-pending-filter
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Pending tab state is visually clear
Rows or empty state are readable

steps.label: Approve one job
steps.expected_result: Selected job becomes active and gets a moderation history entry.
assertions: Row status changes to active after reload
Published timestamp exists for first-time approval

steps.label: Reject another job
steps.expected_result: Another queued job is rejected with an explanatory reason.
assertions: Rejected row no longer appears in pending filter

steps.label: Bulk-approve multiple jobs
steps.expected_result: Bulk endpoint updates all selected rows in one action.
assertions: Response includes requested and updated counts

steps.label: Review admin users
steps.expected_result: Admin users list returns current admin accounts.
assertions: Response is an array of users
Each item has roles including admin

steps.label: Grant admin role to another user
steps.expected_result: Selected user becomes an admin and the action toggles to revoke.
assertions: Granted user's roles now include admin
Button label changes to Revoke admin

steps.label: Revoke that admin role again
steps.expected_result: The temporary admin access is removed from the selected user.
assertions: Returned roles no longer include admin
Action toggles back to Grant admin

steps.label: Attempt to revoke her own admin role
steps.expected_result: Backend blocks self-revocation for safety.
assertions: Error message explains self-revocation is not allowed

mistake_then_correct.expected_error: You cannot revoke your own admin role
mistake_then_correct.expected_after_correction: Revocation succeeds for a different user

steps.label: Create a moderation report fixture

input_value.details: Seeded report to exercise the admin resolution workflow.

steps.expected_result: A pending report exists so the reports queue is not empty during moderation UAT.
assertions: Response contains report id and pending resolution

steps.label: Open reports queue
steps.expected_result: Open community reports are retrievable for moderation.
assertions: Each report has id, job_id, reason, and resolution

screenshot.label: admin-reports
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Each report card shows reason and actions

steps.label: Resolve one report
steps.expected_result: Selected report transitions from pending to reviewed/dismissed/job_removed.
assertions: Resolved report disappears from open queue or shows updated state

journeys.title: Marta manages a target user's roles, profile, and job visibility

steps.label: Sign in as admin
steps.expected_result: Marta is authenticated and can access admin surfaces.

steps.label: Open admin moderation page
steps.expected_result: Admin dashboard loads with user and report side panels.

screenshot.label: admin-usermgmt-dashboard
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Jobs table and user panel are both visible
Text is readable at desktop resolution

steps.label: List admin-manageable users
steps.expected_result: Admin users endpoint returns current role holders and candidates in the harness.
assertions: Each item includes id, email, and roles

steps.label: Search or filter to the target user
steps.expected_result: Target user card becomes easier to isolate in the admin panel or by harness-side filtering.
assertions: Search control accepts input or harness filters the returned list
Target user remains visible in the narrowed set

screenshot.label: admin-usermgmt-search
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Search field and result state are obvious
No overlap occurs in the side panel

steps.label: Open the target user's public profile
steps.expected_result: Admin can inspect the user's public-facing profile payload when it is active.
assertions: Active profile returns 200 with name/type fields
If inactive, API responds with a controlled 404

steps.label: Review the user's jobs in admin queue
steps.expected_result: Admin can correlate the user with visible jobs in the moderation list.
assertions: Target user's jobs can be identified from poster metadata

screenshot.label: admin-usermgmt-jobs
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Poster information is visible per row

steps.label: Grant admin role to the target user
steps.expected_result: The selected user's role array now contains admin.
assertions: UI updates the card to show Revoke admin

screenshot.label: admin-usermgmt-grant
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Role change is visible on the user card

steps.label: Verify elevated role via API
steps.expected_result: Refetched user list still shows the target with admin privileges.
assertions: Target user's roles include admin after refresh
User remains in the admin list

steps.label: Revoke the admin role
steps.expected_result: Temporary admin access is removed from the target user.
assertions: Roles array no longer includes admin

steps.label: Confirm the target can no longer access admin
steps.expected_result: Using the target user's session in test harness should now fail authorization for admin routes.
assertions: Unauthorized or redirect response occurs for the downgraded user

steps.label: Re-open the user's profile after role change
steps.expected_result: Public profile availability is unchanged by admin-role mutations.
assertions: Profile route behavior is identical before and after role changes
Role grants do not corrupt user profile data

steps.label: Leave admin page in a stable state
steps.expected_result: No pending modal or stale selection remains after user management.

screenshot.label: admin-usermgmt-stable-finish
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Dashboard looks stable at the end of the flow
No stale overlays or dialogs remain

journeys.title: Ana completes onboarding on a small Android viewport with touch gestures and responsive assertions

steps.label: Open home page on mobile viewport
steps.expected_result: The mobile shell loads without horizontal overflow.
assertions: Header content stacks or collapses appropriately
Hero CTA remains visible without zooming

screenshot.label: mobile-home
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Hero fits within the mobile viewport

steps.label: Open mobile navigation or stacked header controls
steps.expected_result: Mobile-specific navigation affordances or stacked controls are reachable by touch.
assertions: Either a hamburger/menu trigger appears or header controls stack vertically
Touch targets are at least finger-friendly size

screenshot.label: mobile-navigation
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Mobile nav affordance is visible or header is clearly stacked
No overlap occurs in the header

steps.label: Open sign-up page
steps.expected_result: Registration form loads in a mobile-friendly single column.
assertions: Create account CTA is visible without desktop-only controls

screenshot.label: mobile-signup-start
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: CTA is visible within the viewport

steps.label: Try an invalid email first
steps.expected_result: Mobile form prevents progressing with an invalid email.
assertions: Email field is still reachable on small screens

mistake_then_correct.expected_error: Email is invalid or form stays disabled

steps.label: Try a short password first
steps.expected_result: Weak-password state remains visible and the CTA stays disabled.

steps.label: Complete the mobile registration form
steps.expected_result: All fields are filled with touch-friendly spacing preserved.
assertions: Form fields remain visible after virtual keyboard interactions

screenshot.label: mobile-signup-filled
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: No field is covered by other elements

steps.label: Submit the mobile registration
steps.expected_result: Mobile registration succeeds and verification instructions appear.
assertions: Confirmation asks Ana to check email

steps.label: Inspect MailHog for verification email
steps.expected_result: Verification email is captured for the mobile-created account.
assertions: MailHog returns a message for the mobile account

steps.label: Open verify-email route
steps.expected_result: Verification succeeds on mobile and shows a tappable sign-in CTA.
assertions: Sign-in CTA fits within viewport width

screenshot.label: mobile-verify
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Verification success copy fits on one screen or scrolls naturally

steps.label: Sign in on mobile
steps.expected_result: Ana becomes authenticated on a touch device.
assertions: Header adapts cleanly for logged-in mobile state

screenshot.label: mobile-login
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Logged-in state is visible on mobile

steps.label: Open account settings on mobile
steps.expected_result: Protected account page remains readable in a narrow viewport.
assertions: Export and danger-zone actions stack vertically

steps.label: Create profile from mobile session
steps.expected_result: Profile creation works even when initiated from a mobile-authenticated session.

steps.label: Swipe into browse jobs and search
steps.expected_result: Browsing and filtering remain usable with touch gestures and virtual keyboard input.
assertions: Search input accepts text after touch interaction
Content can be scrolled vertically without layout breakage

screenshot.label: mobile-jobs-search
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: Jobs list fits the mobile viewport
Cards stack cleanly in one column

steps.label: Open a job detail page on mobile
steps.expected_result: Job detail collapses into a mobile-friendly stacked layout.
assertions: Apply panel stacks under or above the description
Sidebar content does not overflow horizontally

screenshot.label: mobile-job-detail
expected_assertions_for_screenshot_analy: No clipped sidebar or text overflow occurs

steps.label: Open my jobs and confirm empty state on mobile
steps.expected_result: Seeker still sees an empty-state dashboard on mobile with readable copy.
